adjudication_basis: Springer returned cookie-error article HTML rather than a validated PDF or complete structured article. The available content did not establish complete methods, results, and discussion sections.
Springer returned cookie-error article HTML rather than a validated PDF or complete structured article. The available content did not establish complete methods, results, and discussion sections.
Identity-valid PubMed abstract contained approximately 1,140 words. The Elsevier XML response contained only 67 words and did not provide complete methods, results, discussion, or references.
The identity-valid PMC article page supplied approximately 1,943 words of substantive scientific content, but complete methods, results, and discussion structure was not validated.
A publisher document route and submitted-version repository route were recorded, but Optica bot protection and the repository access gate prevented retrieval of a validated scientific document.
The identity-valid Imaging Science article page contained approximately 554 words and did not establish complete methods, results, discussion, or reference content.

Open-access and Creative Commons metadata were present, but the MDPI PDF and article routes returned an interstitial or access-control HTML payload rather than the scientific document. The classification denotes technical inaccessibility, not a paywall.
